Registry / Terms / totalization scale interval (d)

totalization scale interval (d)

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #03574 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20101997OIML R 50-1:1997
#00514
T.4.1.1
the value, expressed in units of mass, of the difference between two consecutive indicated values, for general and partial totalization devices, with the instrument in its normal weighing mode
pending

difference between two consecutive indicated values, expressed in units of mass, with the instrument in its normal weighing mode
